title: June 2021 Back Page – Capital Credit Checks Going in the Mail
summary: If you buy power from AVEC you are a member/owner of AVEC. The money you spend to buy electricity is used to buy the diesel fuel we burn to generate electricity and to pay for EVERYTHING we do to turn that fuel, (and wind and solar), into electricity and deliver it to you.
